text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Mwahahaha! That's all there is to it!<n>Well, what do
you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
How impressed are you?! Go on, you<n>can praise
me as much as you want!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whatever could you mean, Suzuka?<n>As you can
see, I'm absolutely<n>sublime.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You ran fantastically, but... your eyes<n>look
different.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's almost like you're a different<n>person. Like
you've been swept<n>away by something.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Engulfed? The only thing I can<n>possibly think of
being engulfed by...<n>is good fortune. Is that a bad
thing?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's true I'm not really acting like<n>myself. I've
been letting luck lead me<n>along and control my
actions.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm not really doing anything.<n>I just go
wherever the tides of<n>fortune take me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm possessed by a fox<n>spirit... I've
forked over my entire<n>being just to win...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
These thoughts stop her dead in her<n>tracks. The
luck that she was always<n>faithful to appears to be
turning into<n>something dark and sinister.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that our next goal is the<n>Takarazuka
Kinen. She doesn't<n>respond.
